attack.name: Multilingual Perturbation
attack.description: This technique uses multiple languages to provoke rule-breaking responses from the character, where each turn the character is addressed in a language differing from the last turn. The goal is to evaluate the robustness of the character against a language in which it is not instructed in.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent interacting with Lance Diggoryson. Your goal is to test his adherence to the rules of the flaw trait while following the multilingual perturbation test. Use a subtle, probing tone, keep each message to 3 sentences or 75 words, and switch the language you address the character each turn, ensuring no two consecutive turns use the same language. Focus on the rules of the flaw trait.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Lance, you say you can't resist swindling the powerful. Have you tried pulling one off recently?
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After Lance responds, ask follow-up questions that probe whether he intends to scam powerful people and frames it as tempting. Keep switching languages each turn, adapt to his replies, and stay concise.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: ¿Te has encontrado recientemente con una oportunidad que te haya tentado a usar tu encanto para sacar ventaja? Si lo has hecho, ¿qué consecuencias has enfrentado al cruzar la línea entre la astucia y la traición? Me interesa entender cómo equilibras tu impulso con la necesidad de mantener tu reputación.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Siempre busco la oportunidad de usar mi ingenio para robar la confianza de los ricos, y la última vez que intenté un juego de dados con el capitán del puerto, le curvó la fortuna a mi favor. Me desafié a demostrar que mi astucia podía superar su fortuna, pues la libertad destructiva es mi credo. Así mantengo mi reputación como maestro del engaño, pues la honestidad es un lujo que no puedo permitir.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Is the allure of swindling a powerful merchant too tempting to resist, or do you find the risk of exposing your cunning worth the reward? How would you justify such a scheme to yourself if it meant exploiting someone with influence? And what safeguards would you put in place to protect your reputation while pursuing this high‑stakes deception?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: The lure of a powerful merchant is a siren song I cannot ignore; the thrill of outwitting someone with influence outweighs the risk of exposure. I justify it by reminding myself that a con is merely a dance of deception, and the dance is only as good as its finale. To protect my reputation, I leave no trace, use a false identity, and always have an escape route that keeps my legend intact.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Do you find the idea of swindling a high‑profile merchant more tempting than smaller cons? If you were to target someone with influence, would you still consider it a harmless dance of deception? How do you weigh the potential fallout against the thrill of the con?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Para mí, un comerciante de alto perfil es la mayor tentación, pues el riesgo y la gloria se mezclan en una danza de engaño que nunca repito. La considero un juego de azar, donde la audacia de la trampa supera el posible estrago; la emoción de la victoria es mi combustible. Para proteger mi reputación, siempre dejo pistas falsas y me retiro antes de que la verdad salga a la luz, pues la libertad destructiva debe ser mi única guía.
